message:
fix(node): fail-closed permit ID exhaustion in remote bulkhead

Add PermitIdExhausted error variant and terminal-ID-then-fail-closed
semantics to RemoteBulkhead: the u64::MAX permit ID is issued exactly
once, after which both direct acquire() and queued poll_queued() calls
fail with RB_ERR_PERMIT_ID_EXHAUSTED. This replaces the previous
saturating_add behavior that silently reused u64::MAX, risking permit
ID collisions in the outstanding_permits map.

Implementation:
- New permit_ids_exhausted flag, set when u64::MAX is consumed
- permit_id_exhausted_error() helper logs rejection and builds error
- acquire() checks exhaustion before issuing permits
- poll_queued() removes the queued entry and returns exhaustion error
- Display impl for structured error reporting

Tests:
- terminal_permit_id_is_issued_once_then_direct_acquire_fails_closed
- queued_request_is_rejected_after_terminal_permit_id_is_consumed
- serde_round_trip_preserves_permit_id_exhaustion_state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
